sqlMap.select:
select * from CpBank where AppId = #appId#
limit $rowIndex$,$limit$
sqlMap.insert:
insert into CpBank (Id, AppId, TxType, BankCode, BankCardType, BankCardNo, BankCardName, Mobile, CreditValid, CreditCvv, Email, Upi)
values (null,#AppId#,#TxType#,#BankCode#,#BankCardType#,#BankCardNo#,#BankCardName#,#Mobile#,#CreditValid#,#CreditCvv#,#Email#,#Upi#)
sqlMap.update: update CpBank set Id = #Id#, TxType = #TxType#, BankCardType = #BankCardType#, BankCode = #BankCode#, BankCardNo = #BankCardNo#, BankCardName = #BankCardName#, Mobile = #Mobile#, CreditValid = #CreditValid#, CreditCvv = #CreditCvv#, Mobile = #Mobile#, Upi = #Upi# where Id = #Id#
